title: Tarapath — Fiction for Other Skies
prompt: A site for Tarapath, a small South Asian science-fiction imprint publishing four books a year. Literary, strange, cosmic — a publisher with a worldview, not a bookstore.

direction.name: Ancestral Orbit
direction.thesis: A cosmic literary broadsheet where South Asian futures feel archival, strange, and vividly alive rather than commercially catalogued.
direction.signature: A cursor-responsive orbital field anchors the worldview while each geometric book cover tilts subtly toward the reader.
